---
title: "Chris Varghese"
---

![](assets/cover_3.png){.front-figure fig-alt="Blue academic illustration of a campus with data science and AI motifs"}

::: {.intro}
### Chris Varghese

I am a PhD candidate at the University of Auckland, aspiring GI surgeon, and data scientist at Mayo Clinic. My interests include improving [surgical recovery](http://srslab.auckland.ac.nz/), translational [AI](https://www.mayo.edu/research/labs/surgical-artificial-intelligence-innovation/overview), and [GI physiology](https://www.alimetry.com/clinical-evidence-row).
:::

::: {.footer-links}
[![](assets/google-scholar.svg){.footer-icon fig-alt="Google Scholar logo"} Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=rsVXjrMAAAAJ&hl=en)
[![](assets/linkedin.svg){.footer-icon fig-alt="LinkedIn logo"} LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/chris-varghese-3b499912a/)
[![](assets/researchgate.svg){.footer-icon fig-alt="ResearchGate logo"} ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Chris-Varghese-3?ev=hdr_xprf)
:::
